basics.name: M. Fahmi Rizki Syaban, MD, PhD (Cand.)
basics.label: Medical Doctor & Researcher
basics.summary: A medical doctor and doctoral researcher specializing in Molecular Biology and Bioinformatics. Currently conducting advanced research on protein structures and cellular mechanisms at the University of Miyazaki, Japan.

location.address: Jl. Pandean Kidul Baru Rt 004, Rt 008 Bangil

work.name: University of Miyazaki
work.summary: Conducting research in the Graduate School of Medicine and Veterinary Medicine. Focus on FHOD1 protein autoinhibition and molecular dynamics.
highlights: Protein structure prediction and molecular dynamics simulations

work.name: RSUD Harjono Ponorogo
work.summary: Clinical practice and patient care across various hospital departments.

publications.name: In silico study of the structural and functional effects of the V158M variant on the human MAOA protein
